feat.name: Caravan Leader
feat.text: You know how to get the most effort out of your allies on the road. Your group can Hustle for an additional 20 minutes beyond the length of time that the member who could Hustle longest on their own.

traits.name: General
traits.text: A type of feat that any character can select, regardless of ancestry and class, as long as they meet the prerequisites. You can select a feat with this trait when your class grants a general feat.
